title: Correct Figma agent argument handling and plugin contract path governance
description: Correct Figma agent argument handling and plugin contract path governance
no_spec_change_rationale: These corrections affect generated contributor guidance and governance path coverage, not the Figma plugin runtime contract or behavior.
acceptance_criteria: and Gemini classify the complete post-flag input before choosing a module name; Gemini change creation uses its displayed raw arguments with one shell-escaping step; plugin.toml
and docs are meaningful lifecycle paths; native verification and strict SpecSync 100% coverage pass
